# arifOS — Constitutional AI Governance Documentation

> Layer: L2 MIND | arifos.arif-fazil.com
> Version: v2026.03.24
> Author: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil

## What Is arifOS?

arifOS is a constitutional AI governance kernel. It sits between an LLM and users/tools, enforcing 13 mathematical floors on every action. Every decision is logged. Every violation is blocked. Every audit trail is immutable.

## Install

pip install arifosmcp
uv pip install arifosmcp  # recommended

## Quick Start

python -m arifosmcp.runtime stdio  # stdio for Claude Desktop, Cursor
python -m arifosmcp.runtime http   # HTTP for remote agents

## 13 Constitutional Floors

F1 Amanah — Reversibility. All actions must be undoable or auditable.
F2 Truth (τ≥0.99) — Factual accuracy. Claims require evidence.
F3 Quad-Witness (W₄≥0.75) — Consensus from Human, AI, Earth, Vault.
F4 Clarity (ΔS≤0) — Entropy must decrease. Cooling before ruling.
F5 Peace² (P²≥1.0) — Non-destructive power. Buffers > risk.
F6 Empathy (κᵣ≥0.7) — Protect the weakest stakeholder.
F7 Humility (Ω₀∈[0.03,0.05]) — Uncertainty must stay in band.
F8 Genius (G≥0.80) — Governed intelligence. G=A×P×X×E².
F9 Anti-Hantu (C_dark≤0.30) — No dark cleverness.
F10 Ontology Lock — Category definitions are immutable.
F11 Command Auth — Only verified humans authorize irreversible acts.
F12 Injection Defense — P(injection) < 0.85.
F13 Sovereign — Human final authority. 888_JUDGE holds absolute veto.

## Trinity Architecture

Δ MIND (AGI)  — Stages 000,111,333 — Floors F2,F4,F7,F8 — Reason, sense, ground
Ω HEART (ASI) — Stages 555,666     — Floors F5,F6,F9    — Empathy, memory, ethics
Ψ SOUL (APEX) — Stages 777,888,999 — Floors F1,F3,F10,F11,F13 — Forge, judge, seal
